hypothesis: If the integrated workflow reliably identifies cost-effective inorganic synthesis routes, then for Ca2SiO4 in the Ca–Si–O–C–N–H–Al–B space at 800–1600°C, the top-ranked synthesis recipes will exhibit the highest thermodynamic favorability toward Ca2SiO4 (lowest ΔG for formation) and the lowest total reactant cost at 95% purity among all evaluated recipes.
